lyrics.romanizationslyric: he n kyo ku ： yu u yu

lyrics.pairlyric: 沉至悲伤海洋的我

lyrics.pairlyric: 就连睁眼也嫌麻烦
lyrics.romanizationslyric: me wo a ke ru no mo o 'k ku u

lyrics.text: このままどこまでも堕ちて行き
lyrics.pairlyric: 就这样无止境沉没
lyrics.romanizationslyric: ko no ma ma do ko ma de mo o chi te yu ki

lyrics.text: 誰にも見つけられないのかな
lyrics.pairlyric: 没人会发现我的吧
lyrics.romanizationslyric: da re ni mo mi tsu ke ra re na i no ka na

lyrics.text: どこへ向かい 何をすれば？
lyrics.pairlyric: 该去向何方 该做些什么？
lyrics.romanizationslyric: do ko he mu ka i  na ni wo su re ba ？

lyrics.pairlyric: 突然撒落的一束光线
lyrics.romanizationslyric: fu to sa shi ko mu hi to su ji no hi ka ri

lyrics.romanizationslyric: te wo no ba se ba to do ki so u da ke do

lyrics.romanizationslyric: na mi ni sa ra wa re te mi u shi na 't ta

lyrics.romanizationslyric: a re ha i 't ta i na n da 't ta no ka na

lyrics.romanizationslyric: a ta ta ka ku te ma bu shi ka 't ta no

lyrics.pairlyric: 这个说谎的我…
